stemHtml: An aircraft is conducting an LNAV/VNAV approach to runway 26L at an aerodrome with simultaneous parallel operations on all four parallel runways. Per ICAO Doc 8168, what must the aircraft satisfy to perform this approach?

options.a: It must carry receivers capable of acquiring signals from multiple GNSS constellations (European, US, and Russian).
options.b: It must fulfil the eligibility criteria for the specific navigation specification under which the procedure was designed.
options.c: It must hold at minimum a CAT I operations certification.
options.d: It must be fitted with a Head-Up Display.
